solimier

This item droped on TLP server Aradune tonight and kunark has no been released yet. Please reflag as Orginal expansion instead of Luclin,

Sode of Empowerment

# May 29 2011 at 6:12 PM Rating: Good

4,580 posts
Still drops of Master R'tal. Looted one tonight.
▲ Page top
Just got him today
QuoteReply
# May 05 2002 at 8:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772519444
80 posts
We did hate today, killed all the demis, lots and lots of caster loot, finally moved upstairs, pulled this fewl, he didnt drop the sode though, he dropped two warrior vambraces, which the warriors didnt need.. bah! I was so mad, we were there all day too. maybe next time :D This would DEFINETLY replace the Fine Silken mantle I got at a GM event way way back in october 2000 was it? anyway,, its like 6 ac 6 dex and 6 agi.. something.. not bad but I need this SODE! :D this thing looks like GOFM that you put on your shoulders hehe

and BTW, yes a MONK was pulling, and the warrior was tagging, the whole raid.. and That's how it done, so BAH to all you weirdos :D

/rude /feign /shout Train to YOU!!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 20 2002 at 8:35 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) F u and go to Hell that is NOT~~~~~ how pulls should be done in Hate....an ench who is uber like the ones on RZ help me tag cuz THEY are the ones who should be picking out the right targets and kno what they can handle....1 monk is all that is needed to brave the evil pulls of Hate...many try and fail I did it right the first time ^_^ ....any complaints I welcome a cup of /d on RZ ~
Grandmaster R'tal

The picture was probably taken before Kunark is all. There are several like that on this site.

▲ Page top
Regarding Monks as Best Pullers
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 4:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361360302
Scholar
28 posts
As a GENERAL rule, monks are the best pullers. It is possible to make-do with other classes. In certain environments other classes can pull just as well as a monk or even better, especially if they are higher level. Also, almost every class has some experience pulling, but if you are monk, the odds are that you have been the puller in 75% of all the groups you have ever been in. If you weren't the puller, it was usually because there was a second monk in the group pulling instead hehe. Basically monks tend to be the most experienced pullers.
▲ Page top
Monk pulling
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2001 at 11:40 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Bah, you're telling me you wouldn't like a monk pulling for you in the plains? Well BAH on you... you're taking all of the fun out of the game, always wondering how to get yourself mroe loot with less people. Relax and have some fun guys, it's just a game after all. Later.

Kabaril Reeferboy
Forty-Second Monk (Fennin Ro)
House of Swiftjustice

heh.. I goto hate cause I actually enjoy pulling, got a sode lastnight.. will I still pull hate? yep, if I ever get that haste cloak, will I still pull hate? hell yeah, it's FUN
▲ Page top
RE: man monks get gyped
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2001 at 12:52 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Hehe actually some of the best monk items in the game drop in the planes unfortunately not in hate. The only problem is if you want to go to hate you MUST have a monk puller there is just no other way around it. As a monk myself I really hate this plane but when I want to get into a fear or growth raid it is nice to be known for the great job I did pulling Hate. Makes it alot easier to go.
▲ Page top
RE: man monks get gyped
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2002 at 1:20 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593966274592
Scholar
76 posts
Some of the best monk items drop in planes? boggle.

None of the monk armor sets from any plane are any good. They ALL suck.

Some named drops, like the rak cloak, are good, but not what they should be for being planar items.

IM NOT SAYING Good items dont drop on the planes, im saying that 99.8% of monk items dropped are far inferior to items that can be found outside of the planes.

And anyone who knows the planes knows that pulling PoG is /////nothing///// like pulling hate. Hate is almost a city zone, PoG is like NK. Much different pathing, agro properties, etc.

And wheover said it, no one is debating that monks are the best pullers. Its not even something anyone over level 1 would question. Besides very specific pulls other classes do better (the kallis stormcaller pull in kael arena done by a shadowknight using darkness comes to mind), monks are far superior.

And lastly, two monks with their heads together can pull anything in the game. (except expressly unsplitable mobs).
▲ Page top
RE: hate puller
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2001 at 9:20 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
